description: Restaurant POS + Management System — React 18 frontend, Express/MySQL backend, offline-capable

preferences.codeStyle: inline CSS with CSS variables, no UI framework
preferences.errorHandling: try/catch with { success, data, message } envelope
preferences.database: MySQL via mysql2/promise with parameterized queries
preferences.auth: JWT Bearer token in Authorization header
preferences.navigation: AppShell.js state key, NOT React Router routes for admin pages
